Video.summary: Trying to regain custody of her children, Shamika wants to prove her ex is the father of her youngest child.
Video.title: Plaintiff’s Paternity Petition

Video.summary: The plaintiff sues her ex-boyfriend for a cellphone and cellphone bill and says she caught him cheating; he brings to court threatening text messages she sent to him.
Video.title: Calling Collect

Video.summary: Damien sues Sal for $35 million, alleging Sal's car service ruined his marrage by dropping his wife at his mistress' house. Sal denies fault, prioritizing business growth.
Video.title: Car Service Scandals

Video.summary: A messy breakup leads to a heated dispute over car damage, cheating accusations and a demand for compensation.
Video.title: Dooley vs. Sanders

Video.summary: Prestonie sues his mother for assault and hotel bills and claims she admitted to hating him.
Video.title: Mommy Issues

Video.summary: A woman sues her father, who she says was a great role model who was always there for her, for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Love vs Lease

Video.summary: After a life-altering amputation, Brooke brings girlfriend Brenna to court to address concerns regarding her caretaking.
Video.title: Fletcher vs. Stewart

Video.summary: Terrell sues girlfriend Kristy for damages because he suspects she is using him for money.
Video.title: Marrow vs. Coleman

Video.summary: Jahnasia confronts Kelechi about his sudden emotional distance and possible betrayal after years of planning a future together.
Video.title: Arnold vs. Ijomah

Video.summary: A father's doubt and a mother's plea collide in court over paternity, love and a baby's future.
Video.title: Willis vs. Hagans

Video.summary: A paternity battle ignites as Janay seeks justice, while Dale's doubts and secrets keep him on the defensive.
Video.title: Smith vs. Anderson

Video.summary: Past infidelity has a girlfriend and boyfriend at odds over the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Ogletree vs. Lockhart

Video.summary: A marriage is on the line as accusations of betrayal and overprotection threaten two decades of love and business.
Video.title: Heard vs. Macon

Video.summary: A woman sues her boyfriend after he tore her dress saying it was too revealing.
Video.title: Edmonds vs. Steele

Video.summary: A New Jersey woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property exchange of her beloved cat.
Video.title: Monsanto vs. Eskander

Video.summary: A 9-year age difference and past infidelity have Samoria questioning her relationship with Marlon. Polygraph results will determine their future.
Video.title: Fitzpatrick vs Shields

Video.summary: An unruly puppy and Darius' girlfriend's panty problem has Darius issuing his girlfriend, Ife, an ultimatum.
Video.title: Wilson vs. Graham

Video.summary: A battling couple face off in court over trust, heartbreak and the custody of their beloved rabbit, Oreo.
Video.title: McCoy vs. Norman

Video.summary: Mikeyah and Marcus have come before the judges to determine if they should stay or walk away.
Video.title: Grice vs Haynes

Video.summary: Angela is prepared to call off her wedding if her fiancée, Juan, proves to have been unfaithful.
Video.title: Martinez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Trust issues and tension rise as Danielle confronts Brandon about his ex-wife and lack of motivation.
Video.title: Hatch vs. Banks

Video.summary: Shawndreca has a few demands before she marries Derrick and hopes the Cutlers can help to determine whether she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Robinson vs. Ballard

Video.summary: In an emotional case of irreconcilable differences, J'Licia and Jose attempt to save their marriage.
Video.title: Hernandez vs. Hernandez

Video.summary: The limits of polyamorous-turned-monogamous couple Ericka and Rashaad are tested when a surprise witness drops a bomb.
Video.title: Calhoun vs. Sowell

Video.summary: A once-thriving relationship teeters on the edge as accusations of infidelity and neglect come to light in court.
Video.title: Osborne vs. Osborne

Video.summary: Sexual frustrations and a gambling addiction threaten Drew and Aubrey's 16-year relationship as they battle for reconciliation.
Video.title: York-Ketner vs. Ketner

Video.summary: Past infidelity and the discovery of a homoerotic dating profile have husband and wife Laffiama and Amy feuding in court.
Video.title: Murillo vs. Murillo

Video.summary: Natheefa sues her brother Clifford, accusing him of stealing her 55" TV and owing $4,750 in rent after abruptly moving out. Clifford claims he left due to household tensions and took his own belongings.
Video.title: My Brother Stole My TV

Video.summary: Malika Jules claims Shamika Chambers' son broke her iPad at her salon, costing $385 to replace. Shamika denies responsibility, saying all kids were playing together, and insists there's no proof her son caused the damage.
Video.title: Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad

Image.alt: Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad
Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad
Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad

Video.summary: Rachael sues ex-roommate Jean for $750 after he gave her a bounced check for her security deposit. She claims he caused chaos by moving 15 people in, while he accuses her of theft and promiscuity. Both bring explosive allegations to court.
Video.title: Roommate Sex Refusal

Video.summary: Jada is suing her mother for $4,000 in unreturned property after kicking her out of the house.
Video.title: Smart Mouth and Bad Attitude

Video.summary: Eleanor believes that the defendant may be the daughter of her brother, who has been deceased for 18 years.
Video.title: Trying to Make It Official

Video.summary: A woman says the defendant began cheating on her after she got pregnant with his child; she sues him for unpaid child support; the defendant claims he has fallen on hard times since the pandemic.
Video.title: Broken Promises, Unpaid Dues

Video.summary: A woman accuses her cousin of crashing her car with the plaintiff's children inside.
Video.title: Mathis Take the Wheel

Video.summary: Corina broke up with Anthony after choking her but after finding out she's pregnant, sues for child support.
Video.title: Get It On Record

Video.summary: Miguel is suing his ex-girlfriend for the entire $5 million which she won via a scratch-off ticket.
Video.title: Tickets to lies

Video.summary: Wilbur and his wife are suing his sister, Jennifer, after their son was left out of their grandmother's will.
Video.title: Will-fully Repugnant

Video.summary: The Wilsons sue Sean Moore, Ballpark Bandits sponsor, for $10,000. Their son got fired mid-season, Sean blames Kevin's erratic behavior and Laurie for fostering negativity and intimidating parents.
Video.title: Little League, Big Problems

Video.summary: Erica Green is suing her ex-trainer Susan White for emotional distress and fraud, seeking $15,000. Erica reached her goal weight in 2019 but gained 30 pounds during Covid. She signed up for Susan's "Waist Away" program with a weight loss guarantee but gained 25 pounds. Susan blames Erica's non-commitment and countersues for defamation, seeking $25,000. Erica's current trainer, Mark, regrets taking her as a client, as she fired him and he witnessed her unhealthy eating habits.
Video.title: Waisting Away

Video.summary: Michelle is suing Michael and Nuri for negligence and business loss after her high-end spa was damaged.
Video.title: Piglet Parade

Video.summary: Annie sues ex-best friend Olivia for $150K emotional distress. Olivia, once maid of honor, hijacked wedding plans, changing venue and dresses. Annie feels betrayed, removed Olivia from bridal party. Olivia defends, says she improved wedding.
Video.title: Nuptial Nemesis

Video.summary: Maddy sues Vanessa for theft and emotional distress, seeking $300,000. Their IVF journey soured due to suspicions of cheating and missing money. Vanessa claims shared IVF funds; Maddy discovered an affair with Tyler, a mutual friend.
Video.title: Conception, Deception

Video.summary: Forty-six-year-old Jennifer Lozada is suing her husband and his mistress for alienation of affection.
Video.title: Alienated Whistleblower

Video.summary: Mindy Santez sues Roy Franklin for $2M over Timmy's ruined Olympic career due to Roy's drunken scooter incident at a July 4th festival. Mindy claims Roy's ongoing violations led to harassment. Roy cites alleged targeting, like cat removal.
Video.title: Rascal Roy & HOA Nightmare

Video.summary: Barbara sues Emilio's strip club for $30,000, alleging negligence and emotional distress. She claims whiplash from Jackson's performance and a collapsing chair. Emilio denies responsibility, citing safety and Barbara's drinking.
Video.title: Tornado Tassel

Video.summary: Evelyn sues Dexter for $500K, saying he tricked her into leaving her marriage, causing financial ruin and distress. Dexter denies, saying she pursued him as a gold digger.
Video.title: For Love or Money

Video.summary: Ariana Garcia, 19, is suing her parents for refusal to acknowledge and respect her privacy and boundaries.
Video.title: Baby Blues

Video.summary: Gabriella is suing her former employer for $600,000 for mental anguish and wrongful termination.
Video.title: Anniversary Blowout
